title: Smoke from the Workshop
description: You ran two experiments involving ingredient 1. What will mixing ingredient 1 with ingredient 7 (NNN) produce?

hints.text: What do the B− and R− results tell you about ingredient 1?
Ingredient 1 produces B− with ingredient 3, and R− with ingredient 5. What alchemical has both B− and R− aspects?
Ingredient 1 must be npN: R=small−, B=large−. npN + NNN: B has same signs (both −) but... wait, check R: both −, small vs large → resolves R−.
